changes.summary: BC-09 inv-05 guards: isEventPostType, evaluateEventPublicationVoteGate (PermissionGatesPort), assertEventPublicationNotVotable/NotForwardable/NotBirzhaEligible with TRPCError messages aligned to forward/vote routers.
CreateEventUseCase: postCost quota/wallet pre-checks, eventService.createEvent, inv-05 postType event assertion, quota_usage and global wallet debit after create. createCreateEventUseCase factory.
RsvpEventUseCase: attend/unattend via EventService; createRsvpEventUseCase factory.
CheckInByTokenUseCase: delegates checkInByToken to EventService; createCheckInByTokenUseCase factory.
SetParticipantAttendanceUseCase: delegates setParticipantAttendance to EventService; createSetParticipantAttendanceUseCase factory.

events.createEvent, attend, unattend, checkInByToken, setParticipantAttendance delegate to use cases; removed inline postCost orchestration (~100 lines). Other procedures still delegate to EventService.

notes: inv-05 vote/forward/Birzha enforcement remains in votes.router, forward use cases, and publications.create guard; event-inv05-guards centralizes the same rules for BC-09 reuse. Remaining events.* procedures (update, delete, invites, merit transfer) still call EventService directly.
